name: C-10: Extra fields in JSON are ignored
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Creation should succeed
assert ('id' in {'error': True, 'message': '{"result":{"message":"поле likes обязательно","messages":{}},"status":"400"}\n', 'status_code': 400} or 'ad_id' in {'error': True, 'message': '{"result":{"message":"поле likes обязательно","messages":{}},"status":"400"}\n', 'status_code': 400})
statusTrace:
api_tests/test_idempotency.py:65: in test_extra_fields_ignored
    assert "id" in response or "ad_id" in response, "Creation should succeed"
E   AssertionError: Creation should succeed
E   assert ('id' in {'error': True, 'message': '{"result":{"message":"поле likes обязательно","messages":{}},"status":"400"}\n', 'status_code': 400} or 'ad_id' in {'error': True, 'message': '{"result":{"message":"поле likes обязательно","messages":{}},"status":"400"}\n', 'status_code': 400})
